events.title: Achieved SOC 2 Type II for Watchtower and Pulse
events.details: Audit completed; controls cover data security, availability, and confidentiality across core services.

events.title: Pulse adds anomaly detection and seasonal baseline modeling
events.details: Early customers report fewer noisy alerts and clearer incident prioritization.

events.title: Partnered with CloudMart to deliver marketplace analytics blueprints
events.details: Prebuilt patterns for marketplace operations and seller onboarding health.

events.title: Watchtower 3.3: Faster Shopify connector and new order-latency metric
events.details: Connector performance improved ~40%; adds latency tracking for orders and webhooks.

events.title: Technology partnership with TinyETL for no-code connectors
events.details: Co-built connectors and shared go-to-market initiatives to accelerate data onboarding.

events.title: Announced $12M Series A led by Notional Ventures
events.details: Capital allocated to engineering hiring, partner programs, and developer tooling.
